# Dependency Documentation

Wayfinder has no ecosystem runtime dependency.

Allowed relationships:

- design-time reference to evidence, proposals, RFCs, ADRs, and compliance
  evidence;
- Commons publication of mechanical artifacts after Wayfinder semantic
  approval;
- ARK retention of verified evidence without semantic ownership transfer;
- Observatory receipt of operational telemetry without control dependency.

Forbidden relationships:

- runtime dependency on any ecosystem repository;
- consumer semantic forks;
- implementation behavior becoming semantic authority;
- generated artifacts becoming source of truth.
